chat.title: Chat
chat.phase1Notice: Phase 1 placeholder — chat is not yet wired.

empty.title: No chats yet
empty.description: Start a new conversation to get going.

composer.shortcutHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.rateLimit: You're sending messages too fast. Please wait a moment.
errors.modelError: AI is having trouble responding. Please retry.
errors.contextTooLong: Conversation is too long. Start a new chat to continue.

delete.title: Delete chat?
delete.description: This will permanently delete this chat and all its messages.

archive.title: Archive chat?
archive.description: Archived chats are hidden but can be restored later.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to your Magic Prompt account.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.description: Start using Magic Prompt in minutes — no credit card required.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.description: Enter the email associated with your account and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.successGeneric: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.description: Enter your new password below. You'll be signed in once it's saved.

verify.title: Check your inbox
verify.descriptionWithEmail: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to finish signing up.
verify.descriptionGeneric: We sent you a verification link. Click it to finish signing up.
verify.expiry: The link expires in 1 hour. If you don't see the email, check spam — or

fields.tos: I accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
